prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2022年天津市为综合改革省份（min_rank为0），2024年最低位次约348名，2025年大幅前移至约106名，近两年位次显著提升，2025年基准约106名；北京大学在天津市招生计划2021–2024年均为35人，2025年增至37人，2026年进一步增至39人，连续两年小幅扩招，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第2名，属于全国顶尖学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年高考周期内北京大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档或投档线异常、食堂宿舍等事件；抖音热度排名第3（高热），综合热度约1136万，反映报考关注度极高；历史投档异常信号显示2025年湖北提前批首次出现招生空档，但整体录取热度仍处顶尖水平；北京大学拥有极其丰富的A+学科，包括数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、法学、应用经济学、中国语言文学、哲学、社会学、心理学、电子科学与技术、环境科学与工程、软件工程等，A-及以上学科远超10个，学科综合实力全国顶尖，对各类专业报考均有强力支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信为高热推荐专业，数学/统计为推荐专业，法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望；天津市2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（54025→56764→67634→68514→71938），2026年约82000人，较2025年增长约14%，竞争加剧；北京大学位于北京市，与天津市为邻省，地域接近性较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约106名、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（37→39人，+5.4%）对竞争略有缓解、天津市考生总数增长约14%加剧竞争、学校顶尖层次与高热关注度维持强吸引力等因素，供需弹性修正后预测位次约109名，与2025年基本持平；预测最低位次约109名，区间59–159名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（59–159名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业为冲刺目标、三档专业为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（如进入前60名）可重点冲刺一档的元培试验班和计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（约150名左右）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次要求较低的专业。北京大学各专业学科评估均为A+/A级，整体实力顶尖，考生可根据个人兴趣与职业规划灵活选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2022, Tianjin was a comprehensive reform province (min_rank was 0). The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 348, and it significantly advanced to about 106 in 2025, showing a notable improvement in recent years. The 2025 baseline is about 106. Peking University's enrollment plan in Tianjin was 35 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 37 in 2025, and further to 39 in 2026, with two consecutive years of slight expansion, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It has consistently ranked 2nd in the Shanghai Ranking for many years, making it a top-tier institution nationwide, which strongly attracts candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, Peking University's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission gaps or abnormal cutoff scores, and dormitory/cafeteria incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 11.36 million, reflecting extremely high application attention. Historical abnormal admission signals show that in 2025, Hubei's early batch saw a first-time enrollment gap, but overall admission heat remains at the top level. Peking University has an extremely rich set of A+ disciplines, including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, Applied Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Sociology, Psychology, Electronic Science and Technology, Environmental Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, etc. It has far more than 10 disciplines rated A- or above, with comprehensive disciplinary strength at the national top, strongly supporting applications for various majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended majors; Mathematics/Statistics are recommended majors; Law, Finance/Economics are differentiated and wait-and-see. The total number of candidates in Tianjin from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (54025→56764→67634→68514→71938), and in 2026 it is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% compared to 2025, intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing, which is adjacent to Tianjin, providing strong regional proximity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 106, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (37→39, +5.4%) which somewhat alleviates competition, the approximately 14% increase in the total number of candidates in Tianjin which intensifies competition, and the top-tier level and high attention of the university maintaining strong attraction, after supply-demand elasticity adjustment, the predicted ranking is about 109, basically flat with 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 109, with a range of 59–159.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (59–159), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., entering the top 60), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Yuanpei Experimental Class and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 150), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. All majors at Peking University have A+/A evaluations, with overall strength at the top level. Candidates can flexibly choose based on personal interests and career plans.
